title: TnArrow
description: A simple datapack that makes arrows explode!
body:
# A simple datapack/mod that makes arrows explode
### what it adds? It adds ability to arrows to explode
### how to use: 1. shoot an arrow 2. It flies 3. It hits block 4. It explodes 5. you have fun ### how it works? when arrow has hit a block it triggers it to explode
